validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.body: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account with this email exists, we sent a password reset link.
forgotPassword.genericError: Could not send reset link. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.body: Enter your new password below. Make sure it's strong and secure.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.expiredLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.generic: Could not update password. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

register.title: Register
register.siteBandNamePlaceholder: Enter the name of your band, or some other name for this site

emailVerification.verifyBody: We use email confirmation to protect your account and access to content publishing.
emailVerification.emailWillBeSentTo: The email will be sent to {{email}}
emailVerification.onboardingBodyAlbums: We use email confirmation to protect your account and access to music uploads.
emailVerification.onboardingBodyPosts: We use email confirmation to protect your account and access to article publishing.
emailVerification.onboardingBodyMixer: We use email confirmation to protect your account and access to mixer tools.
emailVerification.onboardingBodyPaymentSettings: We use email confirmation to protect your account and access to payment settings.
emailVerification.onboardingBodyContent: We use email confirmation to protect your account and access to content publishing.
emailVerification.bannerText: Verify your email to unlock all features
emailVerification.bannerSubtitle: We sent a verification link to {{email}}
emailVerification.successBody: Your email has been successfully verified. You now have full access to all features.
emailVerification.expiredBody: This link is no longer valid or has expired. Please request a new verification link.
emailVerification.changeEmailBody: Enter your new email address. We'll send a verification link to the new email.
emailVerification.restrictedHint: Verify your email to unlock this feature
emailVerification.restrictedPremium: Verify your email to purchase Premium
emailVerification.restrictedUpload: Verify your email to upload content
emailVerification.restrictedPaymentSettingsHint: Verify your email to configure payment settings
emailVerification.restrictedMixerHint: Verify your email to upload stems and manage the mixer
emailVerification.resendFailed: Could not send email. Try again later.
emailVerification.resendCooldown: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds before requesting another email.
emailVerification.resendRateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
emailVerification.verificationSentBody: Check your inbox for a new verification link.

buttons.errorDownloadingAlbum: Error downloading album. Please try again.

artistOnboarding.welcomeDescription: Your music, stories, articles, and everything you create will live here. Fill out your profile to share your work with the world.

release.title: Upload your first release
release.description: Add an album or single so your music appears in the catalog.

biography.title: Write your story
biography.description: Tell listeners about yourself, your inspiration, and your path.

social.title: Add social links
social.description: Connect your social networks so listeners can follow you.

article.title: Publish your first article
article.description: Share thoughts, experience, or stories about making music.

titles.articleLockedOverlayHint: Purchase an album to read this content.
titles.archiveAccessDescription: Unlock exclusive content from any **3 artists** every month.
titles.artistArchiveFullMessage: You have used all archive slots. Replacing an artist will be available later.
titles.premiumSuccessSubtitle: Add this artist to your archive and unlock exclusive content.
titles.premiumSuccessSlotsHint: You can have {count} artists in your archive.

links.offerPageDescription: Public offer for retail purchase and sale agreement via remote means

stems.text: Mixer: turn on/off parts, rewind and listen to the song in layers.
stems.notice: For now, I don't have access to the original stems, so I'm temporarily using tracks extracted from the master with AI. This is solely for testing and demonstrating the mixer, so the audio quality may differ from the final version. Once the original stems are available, I'll update the audio.

socialLinks.title: Social Links
socialLinks.subtitle: Add your social networks. They will be displayed on your artist page.
socialLinks.hint: Leave empty if you don't have a link.

paymentSettings.connectedLede: Fans can now pay for purchases on your site
paymentSettings.disconnectNote: If you disconnect YooKassa, payment acceptance will be unavailable. Your payment data will be saved.
paymentSettings.connectButton: Enter Shop ID and Secret Key
paymentSettings.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect {provider}? You will no longer be able to accept payments through this provider.

yookassa.description: Let people pay for purchases on your site through YooKassa
yookassa.details: To receive payments you need a YooKassa business account. If you have a personal account, you can upgrade it for free. You can use the same YooKassa Business account for multiple seller accounts.
instructionSteps: Sign up or log in to your YooKassa account
Sign a contract and create a store
Find Shop ID under Settings → Store
Issue a Secret Key under Integration → API keys
Enter them in the form below
yookassa.registerLink: Go to YooKassa to sign up →
yookassa.shopIdHint: Shop ID is located under Settings → Store in your YooKassa dashboard
yookassa.secretKeyHint: Issue a Secret Key under Integration → API keys. Important: the key is shown only once — be sure to save it!

archive.title: Your Archive
archive.subtitle: Artists in your archive are unlocked across the platform: tracks, articles, stems and album downloads.
archive.emptySlotHint: Add another artist to unlock their exclusive content.
archive.cooldownInfo: You can change your archived artists once per month.
archive.cooldownNext: Next change will be available on {date}.

mixer.title: Mixer
mixer.stemsDescription: Manage stems of the selected song: mute, solo, upload.
mixer.stemsPlaceholder: Select a song to see its stems.
mixer.stemCoversDescription: Upload photos of musicians for each stem.
mixer.contentDescription: Mixer page description and info blocks for RU and EN.
mixer.contentPlaceholder: Add description and info blocks for both locales.
